title: #126 - Historiskt kursrally för debuterande SpaceX satte rymdsektorn i gungning
summary_md:
# #126 - Historiskt kursrally för debuterande SpaceX satte rymdsektorn i gungning

**Feed**: montrosepodden  
**Published**: 2026-06-18  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

A risk-on episode driven by an emerging US-Iran-Israel ceasefire that reopened the Strait of Hormuz and sent Brent oil down toward 78 USD, plus the record-breaking SpaceX IPO that rallied 57% in three sessions and vaulted past Amazon and Microsoft in market cap. Hosts frame defense stocks (Saab, Rheinmetall, BAE) as rotating into a calmer 'delivery' phase after huge multi-year runs, with insider buying on the way down, while capital chases the new hot theme of space. Side themes include smart glasses growth (Meta/Ray-Ban via EssilorLuxottica, Synsam as Nordic reseller) and Montrose's own new multi-currency account product.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟡 SAAB-B — Saab | **HOLD** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Down ~32% from top as defense theme cools and rotates toward space; hosts expect focus to shift from new orders to delivering full order books.

#### Reasoning

After a massive multi-year defense run, Saab has corrected a third from highs as capital rotates to the new hot theme (space). Hosts argue demand for defense remains a decade-plus structural trend (NATO rearmament, raised defense budgets), but the market is entering a 'delivery' phase where execution on order books matters more than new orders. Net: long-term fundamentals intact, near-term momentum faded.

#### Sell Triggers

- if order-book delivery/execution disappoints
- if defense budgets or NATO rearmament stall
- if sector rotation out of defense accelerates

> *"Men sen årsskiftet så är den ner 32%. Och det tycker jag är ganska intressant. För oftast har vi pratat om Saab att den bara fortsätter och fortsätter."*

---

### 🟠 RHM — Rheinmetall | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Europe's largest defense group down ~40% from highs after a near-3000% run; notable insider buying all the way down signals management conviction.

#### Reasoning

Rheinmetall has pulled back ~40% from highs as the defense theme cools, yet there has been consistent insider buying on the way down, which the hosts treat as informative regardless of timing. Structural demand from European rearmament is seen lasting many years, but the stock is in a calmer sector-rotation phase, so it is one to monitor rather than chase.

#### Sell Triggers

- if insider buying reverses to selling
- if European rearmament spending slows
- if valuations stay frothy without order delivery

> *"Det har varit en del insynsköp hela vägen ner. Längs vägen."*

---

### 🟠 BA — BAE Systems | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Down ~21% from highs; described as the market's geopolitical thermometer with insider buying on the way down as the defense theme cools.

#### Reasoning

BAE has corrected ~21% from highs amid the broader defense sector rotation toward space. Hosts again note insider buying on the way down as a positive informational signal, and frame multi-year structural demand (NATO, rearmament) as intact. With near-term theme momentum gone, it is a watch candidate pending a shift to focus on delivery.

#### Sell Triggers

- if insider buying stops
- if geopolitical de-escalation reduces defense demand
- if order delivery disappoints

> *"Och även här på BAE Systems så har det varit en del insynsköp på vägen ner."*

---

### 🟠 SYNSAM — Synsam | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Named as Nordic reseller of Ray-Ban smart glasses; smart-glasses category tipped to grow strongly, potentially toward smartphone-unit volumes.

#### Reasoning

Hosts highlight smart glasses (Meta/Ray-Ban made by EssilorLuxottica) as a category expected to grow very strongly, with some forecasts approaching smartphone-level unit sales. Synsam is flagged as the Nordic reseller, giving it indirect exposure to the theme. Speculative and thematic rather than conviction-backed, so a watch.

#### Sell Triggers

- if smart-glasses adoption disappoints
- if Synsam captures little of the category's growth
- if Ray-Ban/Meta distribution bypasses opticians

> *"Synsam är ju... nordisk återförsäljare på de här. Det är Ray-Ban primärt som man kör som varumärke på sina smarta glasögon."*

---

|--------|---------|--------|----|------|---------|
| **SAAB-B** | Saab | 🟡 HOLD | LT | 55% | Down ~32% from top as defense theme cools and rotates toward space; hosts expect focus to shift from new orders to delivering full order books. |

| **BA** | BAE Systems | 🟠 WATCH | LT | 50% | Down ~21% from highs; described as the market's geopolitical thermometer with insider buying on the way down as the defense theme cools. |
| **SYNSAM** | Synsam | 🟠 WATCH | LT | 45% | Named as Nordic reseller of Ray-Ban smart glasses; smart-glasses category tipped to grow strongly, potentially toward smartphone-unit volumes. |
